intro.speaker: Aviator
intro.text: The signal jamming, the swarms, the fire... it all leads here.
And here you are, little bird, at the doors of my court.

intro.speaker: Aurelia
intro.text: I am Aurelia, Queen of the Aviary. Every wing in this sky beats at MY command.

intro.speaker: Aviator
intro.text: Then I'll just have to clip yours.

intro.speaker: Aurelia
intro.text: Bold. Let us see how you dance beneath a thousand wings!

outro.speaker: Aurelia
outro.text: My court... my beautiful, gilded court...

outro.speaker: Aviator
outro.text: The sky doesn't belong to anyone. That's what makes it worth flying.

outro.speaker: Aurelia
outro.text: Hmph. Then fly, little bird... while I rebuild my choir.

phases.name: Last Word - Empress of the Endless Sky
